name: Calendar ICS
description: Turn event details into a calendar (.ics) file for any calendar app.

inputs.label: Event name
inputs.help: Shows as the calendar entry's title (SUMMARY).

inputs.label: Starts
inputs.help: Local start date and time. Leave blank to default to today. Shared with Meeting Planner so a batch sheet's date column drives both.

inputs.label: Ends
inputs.help: Optional. Leave blank for a 1-hour event.

inputs.label: All-day event
inputs.help: Ignore the time of day and book the whole date.

inputs.label: Location
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Nuremberg, or a meeting link
inputs.help: Where it happens — a place or a URL. Shared id with Meeting Planner (hostCity).

inputs.label: Description
inputs.help: Notes that ride along in the calendar entry.

inputs.label: Event URL
inputs.help: Optional link attached to the event.

inputs.label: Reminder
inputs.help: Add a pop-up alarm before the event starts.
